title: Argostemma kurzii
taxonomy: Argostemma kurzii is a species within the genus Argostemma, which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This family is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The genus Argostemma is native to Southeast Asia and comprises around 80 species of small shrubs and herbs. The Rubiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, each with distinct characteristics. Argostemma kurzii's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within this diverse and widespread family.
